title: Spicy Dense Jamaican Russet Potato Hash
description: A spicy, dense, and flavorful Jamaican dish featuring russet potato and shio-koji-cure. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Toss the chopped red onion with 1 tbsp sunflower oil on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes or until caramelized.
In a medium bowl, mix together shio-koji-cure, allspice, nutmeg, thyme, cayenne pepper, and garlic powder.
Peel the russet potatoes and dice them into 1-inch cubes.
Heat the remaining 1 tbsp sunflower oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes or until they start to brown.
Add the roasted red onion and the spice mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Use a spatula to press the potato mixture down into the skillet, creating a dense and flat surface.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes or until the potatoes are crispy and golden brown.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro before serving.
